ValidationRule.description: When Issue is “Entitlement/Asset Transfer” then “Future Account” field should be mandatory
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL( Issue__c , 'Entitlement/Asset Transfer') , NOT($Setup.ShGl_DisableBusinessLogic__c.Disable_Operation_Request_VRs__c), OR( ISBLANK( Future_Account__c ), ISNULL( Future_Account__c ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Future Account is required when Issue is Entitlement/Asset Transfer
